docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORTEGA, ELISEO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CORONA, ALEJANDRO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES NEW SERVICE ON PROOF OF SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2015 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ORTEGA, ELISEO AS TO DEFENDANT CORONA, ALEJANDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

MATTER CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO SERVICE PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506_
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE: $40) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORTEGA, ELISEO AS TO DEFENDANT CORONA, ALEJANDRO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2015 - CONTINUED FOR NEW PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-23-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS CASE AT TODAYS HEARING. NOT REPORTED. (506)
